channel.title: Comments on: Episode 30 – He’Brew Jewbelation Twelve
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Angel
item.dc:creator: Angel
item.description: Im drinking this right now , and its definitely in my all time top 5
item.content:encoded: Im drinking this right now , and its definitely in my all time top 5

item.title: By: Mario (Brewed For Thought)
item.dc:creator: Mario (Brewed For Thought)
item.description: Nothing wrong with drinking the whole pint. I just had a bottle last night. While my 18 mo. old daughter wanted to share, I felt it wouldn't be responsible sharing such a tasty brew with an unexperienced drinker.
item.content:encoded: Nothing wrong with drinking the whole pint. I just had a bottle last night. While my 18 mo. old daughter wanted to share, I felt it wouldn’t be responsible sharing such a tasty brew with an unexperienced drinker.

item.title: By: Zak Davis
item.dc:creator: Zak Davis
item.description: Hey guys. This is Zak from Shmaltz Brewing. I'm really glad you all enjoyed Jewbelation 12. We had a great time with it too. Thanks a lot for all of the support. Have a great new year. L'Chaim!!
item.content:encoded: Hey guys. This is Zak from Shmaltz Brewing. I’m really glad you all enjoyed Jewbelation 12. We had a great time with it too. Thanks a lot for all of the support. Have a great new year. L’Chaim!!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description:
And, yes, I did drink that whole pint!
L'Chaim!
item.content:encoded:
And, yes, I did drink that whole pint!

L’Chaim!
